visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A studio setting featuring a person wearing a large orange-faced cartoon mask and an orange vest sitting beside a woman with long black hair wearing a pink and black plaid shirt. They are seated at a wooden desk with a white paper cup and a tablet. The background is a grey brick wall with shelves of anime figures and a blue curtain. (2) Cut to a man with short brown hair wearing headphones and a white textured shirt, pointing his finger with an expressive facial expression in front of a shelf filled with figurines. (3) A close-up static image of the Mao Gong鼎 (Mao Gong Tripod), an ancient dark bronze vessel with three legs and two handles, set against a dark grey background. (4) The scene returns to the masked man and the woman at the desk; the woman is looking down at a tablet while the masked man gestures. (5) A high-resolution close-up of the Jadeite Cabbage, showing intricate green leaves with a grasshopper perched on top and a white translucent stalk. (6) A different close-up of a smaller, more compact jade cabbage carving, predominantly light green and white. (7) A close-up of a third jade carving, shaped like a small cabbage flower insert, exhibiting translucent light green hues. (8) Transition back to the studio where the man in the white shirt is speaking passionately, using hand gestures to emphasize his point. (9) The woman in the plaid shirt is seen laughing heartily while the masked man continues to interact with her at the desk. (10) Final scene shows a variety-style layout with a social media handle and promotional text overlaying the woman laughing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 很多人以為. [Logo]: @蔡阿嘎543. (2) [Subtitle]: 故宮的翠玉白菜只有一顆. (3) [Subtitle]: 不是嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 其實有三顆. (5) [Subtitle]: 它有三顆???. (6) [Subtitle]: 故宮三寶只有毛公鼎真的是國寶. (7) [Subtitle]: 三顆分別的品名齁. (8) [Subtitle]: 第一顆叫做翠玉白菜. [Slogan]: 它是瑾妃的嫁妝. (9) [Slogan]: 都是清朝的. (10) [Subtitle]: 第二個叫做翠玉小白菜. [Variety]: 小白菜. (11) [Subtitle]: 第三個叫做翠玉白菜花插. (12) [Subtitle]: 長得都不太一樣. (13) [Subtitle]: 所以課本裡面的應該是第一顆翠玉白菜. (14) [Subtitle]: 只是可能有時候你看到的是第二顆或第三顆. (15) [Subtitle]: 因為它可能是小白菜. [Variety]: 翠玉小白菜. (16) [Variety]: 哇. [Slogan]: 翠玉白菜花. (17) [Subtitle]: 而且它很小一顆. (18) [Subtitle]: 我第一次看到我生氣. (19) [Subtitle]: 你以為是這麼大顆. (20) [Subtitle]: 在歷史課本看到都好像很大一顆. (21) [Subtitle]: 看到生氣. (22) [Subtitle]: 跟手機大小這樣而已吧. (23) [Subtitle]: 因為我們以為的白菜都是. (24) [Subtitle]: 不是你要想. [Variety]: 青江菜的大小. (25) [Subtitle]: 雕很難雕. (26) [Subtitle]: 跟蒙娜麗莎一樣. (27) [Subtitle]: 其實蒙娜麗莎本人超小. [Logo]: 完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 masked man, 1 woman in plaid, 1 man in white shirt.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a white textured polo shirt and headphones. The female character has long dark hair and wears a pink/black plaid button-down shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A podcast-style studio with grey brick walls, a wooden desk, anime figurines (Dragon Ball Z characters) on shelves, a blue curtain, and a floor lamp.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins with a calm, conversational tone and moderate speech rate, explaining a common misconception. Studio silence is clear. (2) A transition whoosh SFX occurs, followed by a second male voice with higher pitch and energy, showing excitement. (3) A burst of canned audience laughter and cheering sound effects (applause track) plays as the second male speaker reaches a punchline. (4) The first male voice resumes, speaking with professional clarity about historical artifacts; pitch is stable. (5) A sharp 'pop' sound effect highlights a specific name mentioned in the dialogue. (6) Continued vocal interplay between the two males and a female voice laughing; female laughter is high-pitched and genuine. (7) A comedic 'boing' or meme-style SFX underscores a joke about the size of the artifact. (8) Rapid-fire dialogue with frequent hard cuts, ending with a final burst of laughter and a light digital UI chime.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Fact 1 -> Fact 2 -> Comparison -> Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain while educating the audience about the 'Jadeite Cabbage' collection at the National Palace Museum, debunking the myth that there is only one piece and revealing its surprisingly small physical size compared to textbook expectations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a typical podcast or talk-show format with high-energy editing and visual aids (photos of artifacts) to maintain viewer engagement.
